modules.title: Introduction to IMNCI
modules.description: Learn the Integrated Management of Neonatal and Childhood Illness framework
objectives: Explain what IMNCI is and why it matters
Identify the four general danger signs

modules.title: Recognizing General Danger Signs
modules.description: Learn to identify the four signs that always require urgent referral
objectives: Name all four general danger signs
Demonstrate how to check each sign
Explain why each sign is dangerous

modules.title: Diarrhea Assessment and ORS
objectives: Classify as severe, some, or no dehydration

modules.title: Cough and Breathing Assessment
modules.description: Count breathing rates and classify pneumonia
objectives: Count breathing rate accurately for one full minute
Know fast breathing thresholds for each age group

modules.title: Practice Case Studies
modules.description: Work through realistic patient scenarios with AI guidance
objectives: Apply IMNCI assessment steps in order
